micro_rules: Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Match argument count, type, unit, and enum values exactly from service_list_snippet.

rows.command_eng: Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
rows.output: {"name":"Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#Television).television_channel == 7) { (#Television).television_channelup(); delay(3600000); (#Television).television_channel = 11; }"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#AirConditioner).airconditioner_airconditionermode == \"cool\") { (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode(\"auto\"); delay(1800); }"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#AirPurifier).airpurifier_airpurifiermode == \"auto\") { (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode(\"sleep\") } delay(7200)"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#AirConditioner).airconditioner_airconditionermode == \"off\") { (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode(\"cool\"); } (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_settargettemperature(24); wait until ((#AirConditioner).airconditioner_airconditionermode == \"cool\"); delay(3600000); (#AirConditioner).airconditioner_settargettemperature(26)"}
